title: Purim: Joy, Charity, and the Hidden Hand of God

sources.title: Megillat Esther (Book of Esther)
sources.notes: Complete text of the Megillah in English and Hebrew. Foundation of the Purim story.

sources.title: Purim and its Mitzvot
sources.notes: Comprehensive guide to the four mitzvot: Megillah reading, Purim feast, Mishloach Manot, and Matanot L'Evyonim

key_themes: The hidden hand of God (Hashem's name not mentioned in Megillah)
The reversal from mourning to joy
chinese_parallels: Concept of hidden providence vs visible miracles
Community celebration and charity during festivals
The reversal of fortune theme (塞翁失马 - blessing in disguise)
